description: Deep royal blue with floating indigo; brown breaks where thin.
Textured teal over flowing blue — mottled, ocean-stone depth.
Metallic bronze breaking over blue — iron-rich, earthy contrast.
Forest green merging with blue — deep, ocean-floor complexity.
Plum-purple blending with blue undertones — rich jewel-tone pooling.
Blue rutile floating on plum — multicolor movement, both glazes show.
Blue flows over bronze base — dramatic blue-brown contrast with movement.
Cool indigo float over warm oatmeal — beautiful contrast of warm and cool.
Vivid rutile blue over white — bold and bright, dramatic movement.
Deep indigo float over crisp white — stark, jewel-like contrast.
Bold turquoise texture over white — coastal, lively surface.
Warm bronze-brown over white celadon — earthy and contrast-rich.
Forest green over white celadon — deep nature tones, luminous.
Blush-to-plum over white — soft rose tones, white base keeps it fresh.
Warm honey amber over white celadon — golden and glowing.
Blue rutile over deep black — the blue pops intensely against the dark.
Moody plum-rose over black — dark jewel tones, richly atmospheric.
Intense forest green over black — deeply saturated, almost volcanic.
Deepest blue over black — glowing indigo where thick, very dramatic.
Blue rutile over rainforest green — blue-green complexity, lush and layered.
Seaweed over rainforest — deeply saturated greens, forest-floor depth.
Blue rutile over honey flux — blue picks up warm amber underneath.
Chun plum over honey — warm rose-amber; flux base makes plum glow.
Seaweed over honey — green with amber warmth, organic and earthy.
Mix 1:1 for sage-mint celadon. Adjust ratio to shift green vs white.
Mix to taste for grey-slate celadon. Obsidian darkens, Snow lightens.
